items.title: Djibouti's president wins unprecedented sixth term with 97.8% of vote
items.dek: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.
items.body: Ismail Omar Guelleh, 78, has extended his already 27-year rule in a poll boycotted by the main opposition candidates.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'You are my god', Japan's PM tells British rock band Deep Purple
items.dek: Hard rock enthusiast Sanae Takaichi beamed as she met the rockers in her Tokyo office.
items.body: Hard rock enthusiast Sanae Takaichi beamed as she met the rockers in her Tokyo office.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Baseball statue broken as it is unveiled in Seattle
items.dek: The mishap occurred as a tarp was pulled off a bronze figure immortalising Hall of Famer Ichiro Suzuki.
items.body: The mishap occurred as a tarp was pulled off a bronze figure immortalising Hall of Famer Ichiro Suzuki.
items.author: IriLine Desk
